lines: The year is 1864. Dark spirits roam the crumbling streets of Edo.
You are a wanderer — blade for hire, curse-hunter by trade.
Word has reached you of an Oni War General terrorising the merchant districts.
You descend into the fog. The streets are quiet. Too quiet.
Find the Oni General. End the curse. Begin your legend.
The Oni War General falls at last.
Its horn crumbles to ash. The miasma lifts.
The streets of Edo breathe again — for now.
But you sense darker forces stirring at the city's edge.
Chapter 1 Complete. The road ahead grows longer.
